Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the methyltransferase TylM1/DesVI family. {ECO:0000305}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=dTDP-4-amino-2,3,4,6-tetradeoxy-alpha-D-erythro-hexopyranose + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = dTDP-alpha-D-forosamine + 2 S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:49148, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:90945, ChEBI:CHEBI:90947; EC=2.1.1.324; Evidence={ECO:0000305|PubMed:18345667};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Involved in the biosynthesis of forosamine ((4-dimethylamino)-2,3,4,6-tetradeoxy-alpha-D-threo-hexopyranose), a highly deoxygenated sugar component of several bioactive natural products such as the insecticidal spinosyns A and D (PubMed:11358695, PubMed:18345667). Catalyzes the dimethylation of the C-4 amino group from dTDP-4-amino-2,3,4,6-tetradeoxy-alpha-D-glucose to yield dTDP-D-forosamine (PubMed:18345667). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:11358695, ECO:0000269|PubMed:18345667}.
